zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Maude de Mortimer於1319年1月9日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯坦福時，她的父親John de Mortimer35歲，母親Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer13歲。她於1334年5月與Simon de La Warde I在英國英格蘭越可爾吉賽利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年5月5日在英國英格蘭享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Maude de Mortimer was born on 9 January 1319, in Stanford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Mortimer, was 35 and her mother, Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer, was 13. She married Simon de La Warde I in May 1334, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 May 1357, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Maude de Mortimer est née le 9 janvier 1319, à Stanford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Mortimer, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de La Warde I en mai 1334, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 mai 1357, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Maude de Mortimer am 9. Januar 1319 in Stanford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Mortimer 35 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer 13. Sie hat im Mai 1334 in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Simon de La Warde I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Mai 1357 im Alter von 38 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Maude de Mortimer è nata il il 9 gennaio 1319 nel Stanford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Mortimer, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Simon de La Warde I nel maggio 1334, nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1357, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Maude de Mortimerが1319年1月9日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスタンフォードで生まれた時，父John de Mortimerは35歳，母Katherine de Hammerton Mortimerは13歳であった。1334年5月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーでSimon de La Warde Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年5月5日にイギリスイギリスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Maude de Mortimer(이)가 1319년 1월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스탠퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Mortimer(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1334년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길즈리에서 Simon de La Warde I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Maude de Mortimer nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1319, em Stanford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Mortimer, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon de La Warde I em maio de 1334, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de maio de 1357, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Maude de Mortimer родилась 9 января 1319 г. в местности станфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Mortimer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Hammerton Mortimer, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de La Warde I май 1334 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 мая 1357 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

Se casó con Simon de La Warde I en mayo de 1334, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1357, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
